identity.name: E1 Personal Finance
identity.description: A minimalist, high-trust finance tracker that blends Swiss precision with organic warmth. Avoids the cold 'SaaS Blue' in favor of Stone, Emerald, and Clay tones.

typography.instructions: Import 'Plus Jakarta Sans' and 'Inter' via Google Fonts in index.css. Use Plus Jakarta for all headings and Inter for body text. Use JetBrains Mono or Inter with 'tabular-nums' for financial data.

layout.auth_layout: Split screen: Left side aesthetic/branding (60%), Right side form (40%). On mobile: Stacked.

buttons.default: h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95

cards.style: bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.style: h-11 rounded-lg border-stone-200 bg-transparent focus:ring-2 focus:ring-stone-900 focus:border-transparent transition-all

charts.style: Minimalist. Hide grid lines if possible. Use custom tooltip with 'bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-lg p-3 text-sm'. Colors: Income=Emerald-500, Expense=Rose-500.

visual_enhancers.gradients: No heavy gradients. Use subtle 'noise' texture overlays opacity-5 if available.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-stone-100/50.

motion.guidelines: Smooth, damped transitions. No bouncy springs for finance.
motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeOut' }}

rules: All interactive elements must have data-testid

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI with the 'Stone' or 'Slate' base color. Override radii to 0.75rem (12px).
3. Implement the Dashboard using the Bento Grid layout defined above.
4. For the Auth Page, use a clean split layout. Left side: Abstract geometric pattern or solid warm stone color with a large quote/logo.
6. Ensure specific data isolation in Supabase RLS policies.
7. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the sidebar/navigation and responsive wrapping.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid generic 'SaaS Blue'. Use Stone/Greyscale + Emerald/Rose.
Don't center everything. Use asymmetry for interest.
Use 2-3x more padding than you think is necessary.
Interactive elements must have hover states.
